title: Noelia Castillo Ramos Dies in Spain After Winning Right to End Her Life
summary_full: Noelia Castillo Ramos, 25, who was in chronic physical and psychological pain, had sought an assisted death since 2024, but her father sued to prevent it.
summary_public: Noelia Castillo Ramos, 25, who was in chronic physical and psychological pain, had sought an assisted death since 2024, but her father sued to prevent it.

ES.label: neutral
